2024 SUBARU OUTBACK ROOF AND SIDE PANEL CONSTRUCTION/MATERIALS
ALLDATA Collision Repair Procedures

Vehicle: 2024 Subaru Outback
Document Type: Construction and Material Classification

PANEL MATERIAL CLASSIFICATION
The 2024 Subaru Outback uses a multi-material body structure. The following
material classifications apply to roof and side panel areas.

MATERIAL SPECIFICATIONS
Rear Side Outer Panel: High-Strength Steel (HSS) 440-590 MPa tensile strength
Roof Panel: Mild Steel, 270 MPa
Center Pillar Reinforcement: Ultra-High-Strength Steel (UHSS) 980 MPa and above
Rear Wheel Arch: HSS 440 MPa

UHSS HANDLING RESTRICTIONS
Components rated above 980 MPa tensile strength in the 2024 Subaru Outback must
not be subjected to heat-based straightening. UHSS components require replacement
only. Subaru Corporation prohibits sectioning of UHSS-designated structural members.

MIG BRAZING REQUIREMENTS
Adjacent joins to UHSS components on the Subaru Outback require MIG brazing
per Subaru joining method specification. Resistance spot welding is prohibited
at UHSS flanges. Refer to Subaru weld map for approved locations.

MATERIAL HANDLING NOTES
Store aluminum-containing components per Subaru handling procedure to prevent
galvanic corrosion. 2024 Subaru Outback aluminum alloy components require
dedicated tooling to prevent cross-contamination with steel dust.

YIELD STRENGTH REFERENCE TABLE
Panel Zone                   Material Class   Tensile (MPa)
Rear Side Outer Panel        HSS              440-590
Rear Pillar Outer            UHSS             980+
Side Sill Reinforcement      UHSS             1180
Roof Panel                   Mild             270
Rear Floor Panel             HSS              440

All material classifications are for the 2024 Subaru Outback unless otherwise noted.
Verify against current Subaru technical service documentation before repair.
